reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención hoy es martes 10 de agosto de 2021 horas 18:45 fui y pedí pasar al baño yo siempre cargó NAFTA hay , justo ese día no cargué está bien decime q jamás cargo muy mal pareció por q siempre me ven hay cargando NAFTA paro a descansar un ratito y sigo con mi labor muy mal de su parte no lo recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service. Today is Tuesday, August 10, 2021, at 6:45 PM. I went and asked to use the restroom. I always fill up my tank there, but that day I didn't fill up. It seems very bad that they always see me filling up my tank there. I stop to rest for a bit and then continue with my work. Very bad of them. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7293247840782148336/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhNTRIa1RnEAE
